11.reason: [Potential null pointer dereference: if t->lchild is NULL, calling pout(t->lchild) will pass NULL to the function, leading to undefined behavior when accessing t->lchild or t->rchild in the next call.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Potential null pointer dereference: if t->lchild is NULL, calling pout(t->lchild) will pass NULL to the function, leading to undefined behavior when accessing t->lchild or t->rchild in the next call.]
